howItWorks.intro: This generator fuel runtime calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Runtime
rules.explanation: Tank capacity divided by fuel consumption rate at current load.

howItWorks.outro: Energy costs and incentives change by region and season. Check with your local utility for current rates.

faq.q: How long will a generator run?
faq.a: A typical 3500W generator runs 8-12 hours on 5 gallons at 50% load.

faq.q: Should I run at full load?
faq.a: No, running at 50-75% load is more fuel efficient and extends generator life.

howWeCalculate.intro: This generator fuel runtime calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
